name: Cap Table
description: An ownership capitalization table that surfaces shareholders, share classes, fully-diluted percentages, vesting status, and dilution events across funding rounds with an inset pie summary for at-a-glance ownership distribution.

standard.description: Full cap table rendering every shareholder with share class, shares owned, fully-diluted percentage bar, and vesting chip. Includes totals footer and inset pie summary on the right for quick distribution scanning.

summary.description: Condensed view showing only an ownership pie chart with aggregated share-class totals and top shareholders. Optimized for executive dashboards and investor update decks where detail is unnecessary.

waterfall.description: Dilution-event waterfall that lists funding rounds chronologically with before/after percentages per shareholder, highlighting dilution deltas with colored badges and connecting arrows between rounds.

visual_brief: A clean, investor-grade table rendered inside a d-surface card with a soft border and subtle zebra-striped rows. The header row uses d-annotation small-caps labels: Shareholder, Class, Shares, % Fully Diluted, Vesting. Each ShareholderRow shows the shareholder name in semibold text with a secondary line for entity type (individual/fund/employee-pool). A ShareClassBadge sits beside the name, color-coded: Common = neutral gray, Preferred Series A/B/C = ascending blue shades, Options/ISOs = amber, SAFE/Convertible = violet. The shares column uses mono-data tabular figures, right-aligned. The PercentageBar fills horizontally within its cell, width proportional to ownership, using a primary-accent fill with a thin track behind it; the numeric percentage overlays the bar in semibold. VestingChip shows 'Fully vested', '4y / 1y cliff — 37% vested', or 'Unvested' with a small progress ring. Rows are clickable and expand inline to reveal grant date, strike price, and acceleration clauses. A sticky TotalsFooter at the bottom shows total shares issued, total fully-diluted shares, and 100% summed percentage. A PieSummary inset (180px circle) floats to the right of the table on wide viewports, with color-coded wedges matching share-class badge colors and a legend below. Waterfall preset replaces the percentage bar with a two-column before/after layout and red/green delta chips showing dilution impact from each funding round, with thin connector lines between adjacent rounds.

layout_hints.note: Cap tables are dense financial data. Use mono-data figures for all share counts and percentages. Right-align all numeric columns. Preserve tabular-nums so digits line up vertically.
layout_hints.row_interaction: ShareholderRow uses d-row[data-interactive] with cursor:pointer. Expanded state reveals grant metadata in a sub-row with a subtle inset background.
layout_hints.percentage_bar: PercentageBar track is 100% of cell width, fill proportional. Use d-annotation[data-bar] with height 8px, border-radius 4px. Percentage text sits centered above or inside the bar depending on fill width.
layout_hints.share_class_colors: ShareClassBadge MUST be consistent across all instances: Common=neutral, Preferred=blue scale, Options=amber, SAFE=violet. Never use red/green for share classes (reserved for deltas).
layout_hints.totals_footer: TotalsFooter uses sticky positioning at bottom of table container. Background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--d-surface) 95%, var(--d-primary) 5%). Font-weight: 600. Always sums to 100% fully diluted.

slots.table-header: Sticky top row with column labels rendered as d-annotation small-caps. Columns: Shareholder, Class, Shares, % Fully Diluted, Vesting. Header has a subtle bottom border and slightly elevated background to distinguish from data rows during scroll.
slots.shareholder-rows: Repeating slot — one ShareholderRow per cap-table entry. Each row uses d-row[data-interactive] containing: Name cell (semibold with entity-type subline), ShareClassBadge, Shares cell (mono-data right-aligned), PercentageBar cell (fills proportionally), VestingChip cell. Rows alternate subtle background tint for readability. Click expands inline detail sub-row showing grant date, strike price, acceleration clauses, and notes.
slots.totals-footer: Sticky footer row aggregating totals: total shares issued, total fully-diluted shares, and 100% sum verification. Uses bold mono-data figures. If percentages do not sum to 100% (floating-point drift), shows warning chip.
slots.pie-summary: Optional inset circular chart (180px) anchored to the right of the table on wide viewports. Wedges colored by share class matching badge colors. Legend below shows class name + aggregated percentage. Hovering a wedge highlights matching rows in the table.
slots.dilution-markers: Waterfall-preset-only slot. Horizontal dilution-event markers appear between round columns as vertical connector lines with round-name labels (e.g., 'Series B — $12M @ $48M pre'). Each shareholder row shows before/after percentages with red (diluted) or green (purchased) delta chips.

keyboard: Enter: expand selected row to show grant details

responsive.mobile: Table reflows to a card-stack layout. Each shareholder becomes a vertical card showing name, class badge, and percentage prominently with shares and vesting in a secondary row. PieSummary hidden. Totals footer remains sticky.
responsive.tablet: Standard table layout with PieSummary collapsed into a toggle button that expands the chart as an overlay. Vesting column truncates to chip-only.

micro.bar-fill: width 0 to target 600ms ease-out on mount

ambient.totals-pulse: subtle background shimmer on totals-footer when values update 400ms ease-out

composition.ShareholderRow: Row(d-row, data-interactive) > [Name + ShareClassBadge + SharesCell + PercentageBar + VestingChip]
